analysis_result: 4/54 (7.41%) PTPRD mutation frequency in the 54-sample WES cohort
discrepancy_analysis: Model result of 4/54 (7.41%) matches the reported paper value of 7% PTPRD (Fig 2b oncoprint) within the ±10% relative difference threshold (relative difference = 5.86%). The paper reports the rounded percentage (7%) from the Fig 2b oncoprint while the model computes the exact fraction from the MOESM5 WES MAF in the 54-sample WES cohort.
